title: The Saga of Tanya the Evil
sourceNotes: S1 anime (12 eps, 2017) adapts roughly light novel volumes 1-2. Paired with the Chika Tojo manga (ongoing, ~70 chapters). The 2019 movie continues with the Republic Arc; S2 announced for 2026.

movies.title: Saga of Tanya the Evil - The Movie
movies.note: Canon sequel film continuing from S1.
